Contact

Contact

For editorial questions, product suggestions, partnership notes, or support requests, email us and include the page URL when relevant.

Clear context helps us respond faster. If you are asking about an article, include the title and the correction or question. If you are asking about a product, checklist, report, or partnership, include the use case, country, expected timeline, and any page that led you here.

We do not provide medical, legal, financial, safety, or professional advice through this contact channel. Questions that require professional judgment should be handled by a qualified professional.

Business email:
guan@shanyuegroup.com

Contact topics

  • Article corrections or cultural context suggestions
  • Product, affiliate, or partnership inquiries
  • Questions about tools, reports, privacy, or site policies
  • Feedback about unclear navigation, broken links, or confusing explanations

We review messages and reply when a direct response is needed. Routine editorial suggestions may be folded into later page updates.

Response expectations

We prioritize messages that include enough detail to verify the issue or understand the request. For corrections, send the exact sentence or section. For business inquiries, include the site, intended audience, and whether the request concerns content, advertising, product comparison, or paid report delivery.

Please do not send passwords, payment credentials, private identity documents, or sensitive medical details through ordinary email. This keeps support communication safer and easier to review.

Herbal Tea Bag Guide

Choose herbal tea bags by flavor, moment, and gift setting without medical claims.

Herbal Tea Bag Guide publishes practical guides, tools, resources, and FAQ for readers.
